overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a samurai character running along a sunny beach toward large traditional wooden ships docked at a coastal settlement. The video features bright midday lighting with a momentary sun glare, and the character moves from open beach to a dock area with wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with distant ships

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the beach toward the distant ships on the horizon

entered.detail: large wooden sailing vessel with multiple masts and white sails anchored offshore
calm blue ocean water along the shoreline
golden sand beach stretching along the coastline
scattered pine trees and bushes along the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide open beach with golden sand. The ocean stretches to the left with large traditional sailing ships visible in the distance, while sparse trees and vegetation line the right side of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching docked ships with sun glare

events.description: bright sun glare washes over the screen as the camera angle shifts toward the sun

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the wet shoreline as the ship grows larger in view

entered.detail: wooden piers and dock buildings visible on the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the wet sand shoreline. A bright sun flare temporarily obscures the view around the 22-second mark. The large traditional ship becomes much more prominent on the left, and wooden dock structures begin to appear on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach alongside docked ships and wooden piers

agents.ego_description: running past the large docked ship and approaching the wooden dock structures

segments.scene_description: The character runs alongside the massive hull of the docked ship, passing wooden piers and dock structures on the right. The beach narrows as the character approaches the settlement area, with the ship dominating the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sun-drenched coastline that transitions from an open beach into a bustling dockside settlement. It begins with the character running across wide golden sands, with the ocean stretching to the left and sparse vegetation lining the right. As the character moves onto the wet shoreline, a bright sun flare momentarily washes over the frame before the view clears to reveal a massive traditional sailing ship looming closer on the left. The scene then shifts as wooden piers and dock structures emerge on the right, narrowing the path. Finally, the camera tracks alongside the towering hull of the docked ship as the character enters the settlement area.
